title: Microsoft 365 - Preserving organizational data due to a position change or retirement
body: Important: At this time there are conversations happening between the Office of Compliance and CyberSecurity to develop policy around retention of data generated within collaboration applications.  Because of the broad scope of applications and data types this will impact, providing guidance specific to Office 365 services will need to align with whatever policy changes occur as part of those discussions.  The current policy in place (as of 11/2023) is documented here but only has guidance specific to email and text messaging. Updates to the current policy will include guidance for other data platforms (e.g. recorded meetings, chat, etc.). We will update our documentation when policy decisions are made. Types of data include but not limited to: Files (documents, spreadsheets, notebooks, etc.) Emails Calendar events Contacts Tasks Data can currently be stored within your account or on local media. Make sure you perform a detailed inventory of all your data before leaving the university. What to do if you want to preserve any of this data: There are a multitude of ways to save/store data - these are recommendations. Data within your Office 365 account Emails can be copied/moved to another account. Move the data to a shared location: such as Office 365 Group, Office 365 Service Account, Google Shared Drive, Box Project Directory, and/or shared network drive Share the data with other user(s) via permissions Export the data and share it with others via media (e.g., flash drive) Data outside your Office 365 account Move the data to a shared location: such as Office 365 Group, Office 365 Service Account, Google Shared Drive, Box Project Directory, and/or shared network drive Share the data with other user(s) via permissions Export the data and share it with others via media (e.g., flash drive) Resources Steps to take before leaving UW–Madison Google Drive Vs Box Vs OneDrive for Business Microsoft 365 - Getting Started with Groups Microsoft 365 - Getting Started with Service Accounts Microsoft 365 - Getting Started with OneDrive for Business UW-Madison Google Workspace - Get started with Google Drive UW-Madison Box - Project Directories Shared network drive - contact your local IT support staff
